svg.text: Offline transcription (faster-whisper) + media downloader (yt-dlp) — Tkinter desktop, Windows-first
v0.4 after Session 5 — Phase 1b (split) + Phase 2a (Whisper) + Phase 3a (yt-dlp) + PyInstaller build

g.text: paste URL, pick file, click Transcribe
Tk is single-threaded — only the polling methods touch widgets.
Workers and subprocess readers only push events to queues.
JSON stdio loop · one job at a time
Holds model in memory across jobs (~3 GB)
core/ — pure Python modules (testable, no Tk)
srt · vtt · tsv · txt · json · lrc
tests/ — 137 tests, 77% coverage on core/ (pytest + responses)
whisper_project.spec · build.bat · BUILD.md — PyInstaller --onedir build pipeline
config.json theme · model_path · device · vad · output_formats · auto_transcribe
history.db SQLite — downloads, transcriptions, restore on launch
<title>.{srt, vtt, tsv, txt, json, lrc, otr, mp4, mp3, m4a, ...}
model ZIP, resumable Range, MD5 verify
